description: Create a content slide on global aging with a sidebar-right layout, featuring stacked bar charts comparing world, more developed, and less developed age groups plus median age callouts.

header.headline: By 2050, the global median age will increase by 5.3 years – Half of the world's population will be older than 36 years
header.sub: Age groups and median age [%, years]

sidebar.title: Median age and implications
sidebar.body: Median age rises globally from 30.3 in 2015 to 35.6 in 2050. More developed regions increase from 41.2 to 46.3, while less developed regions rise from 27.9 to 33.6. Population aging is broad-based, with the share of people aged 65+ increasing across all regions.
